job: Replace standard tank water heater (40–50 gal, like-for-like)
source: Angi 2026 cost data (survey of 30,000+ real customers): professional tank-style water heater replacement runs $881–$1,825 (avg $1,346). DIY unit-only cost typically runs $500–$1,200 per NerdWallet — DIY installation can void the manufacturer warranty and violate local plumbing/gas code, so many jurisdictions require a licensed pro regardless of cost.
regionNote: U.S. typical; permit and code upgrades (pan, expansion tank) add cost.
